channel.title: RVA Burlesque
channel.description: Burlesque shows in Richmond, VA. Confirmed dates only; tentative [TBD] dates are kept out of the feed until firmed up.

item.title: Orchard After Dark
item.description:
When: Saturday, June 6, 2026 · 8pm – 9:30pm

Where: Blue Bee Cider, 4811 Bethlehem Rd, Richmond, VA 23230

Cost: $20

Sultry, fairy-lit burlesque experience set in an enchanted orchard. 18+. Performers: Bunny Noir, Empress de Naste, Luna LaMorgue, Venessa Chevelle.

item.title: It's Britney B*tch Burlesque
item.description:
When: Monday, July 6, 2026 · 8pm – 10:30pm

Where: Ember Music Hall, 309 E Broad St, Richmond, VA 23219

18+ themed burlesque series at Ember Music Hall. Final scheduled date of the run.

item.title: Lip Sync Battle Burlesque — 10th Anniversary
item.description:
When: Sunday, July 12, 2026 · 8pm – 10:30pm

Where: Ember Music Hall, 309 E Broad St, Richmond, VA 23219

10th anniversary of Ember Music Hall's Lip Sync Battle Burlesque show.

item.title: Liver Alone: A Burlesque Reimagining of Scream
item.description:
When: Sunday, October 4, 2026 · 8pm – 10:30pm

Where: Ember Music Hall, 309 E Broad St, Richmond, VA 23219

Burlesque reimagining of the Scream films at Ember Music Hall. Matinee and evening shows on the same day; evening time listed here.

item.title: RVA Burlesque Festival
item.description:
When: Thursday, November 5, 2026

Where: RVA Burlesque Festival (multiple venues), Richmond, VA

The major annual multi-day burlesque festival. Applications opened in spring; ticket info on the festival site.

item.title: Clothes/Off 2: Cagier & Uncaged
item.description:
When: Sunday, November 29, 2026 · 8pm – 10:30pm

Where: Ember Music Hall, 309 E Broad St, Richmond, VA 23219

Themed burlesque show at Ember Music Hall.
